investigation_summary: $5B FTC fine (2019) for Cambridge Analytica / consent-decree breach. UN FFM tied Facebook to Rohingya atrocities. Haugen leaks on teen Instagram harms. €1.2B GDPR fine (Ireland). DOJ antitrust challenge to Instagram/WhatsApp deals. Russian IRA 2016 operations. Content-moderator PTSD $52M settlement.

profile.tax_summary: ~18% FY2023 effective vs 21% statutory; Ireland EU routing; EU scrutiny.
profile.legal_summary: Cambridge Analytica; Myanmar litigation; teen mental health AG suits; monopoly case; COPPA-adjacent issues historically; Oversight Board limited power; 2024–2025 policy shifts under political pressure per press.
profile.labor_summary: Moderator psychological harm settlement; organizer firings (NLRB); large contractor footprint.
profile.environmental_summary: Data-center energy; renewables/REC progress. CDP A- (2023).
profile.political_summary: ~$19.2M lobbying (2023). Zuckerberg political spending & 2024–2025 posture changes in press.
profile.product_health: Algorithmic engagement harms documented in internal research leaks.
